The restriction period has ended, and you can now use the service normally again.
Please continue to help us build a healthy community culture.

purpose.body: These Terms aim to regulate the rights, obligations, and responsibilities between the company and members regarding the use of the SNS/Community service (including mobile/web, hereinafter "Service") provided by "ARA" (hereinafter "Company").

definition.member: "Member" refers to a person who agrees to the company's terms and creates an account to use the service.
definition.content: "Content" refers to all data including text, images, voice, video, links, etc., that members upload/transmit/post on the service.
definition.paid_service: "Paid Service" refers to services used by paying a fee, such as digital items, subscriptions, ad removal, additional storage, etc.

contract.h: Article 3 (Establishment and Qualification of Use Contract)
contract.agreement: A use contract is established when a member agrees to the terms and privacy policy and completes the signup process.
contract.verification: Identity verification procedures, including social login, may be required.
contract.age_limit: Persons under 14 years old cannot sign up. The company may request age verification documents if necessary.

community.guidelines: Members must comply with laws, terms, and community guidelines.
community.prohibited_content: Posting/transmitting/promoting content that infringes on others' rights or is illegal, harmful, discriminatory, hateful, obscene, or violent is prohibited.
community.prohibited_actions: Unauthorized collection/posting of personal information (own/others), spam/advertising/phishing, account sharing/transfer, and access/collection/scraping using automated means are prohibited.
community.violations: The company may delete posts, limit exposure, or temporarily/permanently suspend accounts in case of guideline violations.

member_duty.password: Members are responsible for managing their account passwords.
member_duty.identity: Members must not steal others' names/payment methods or register false information.
member_duty.ai_output: AI features must not be used in ways that infringe on third-party rights.

license.copyright: The copyright of the content posted by members belongs to the members.
license.grant: Members grant the company a non-exclusive, royalty-free, worldwide license to store, reproduce, post, display, transmit, and edit (format changes only) the content for service operation/improvement/promotion. This license can be revoked upon post/account deletion.
license.responsibility: Members bear all legal responsibility for content that infringes on others' rights.

ai.usage: The service may use AI/algorithm features for post recommendations, content generation/summarization, and report review assistance.
ai.disclaimer: AI results may contain errors and are provided for reference. Members should review and verify results themselves.

payment.pricing: Prices, payment conditions, and refund policies for paid services are separately notified on the screen.
payment.policy: App market/payment gateway policies may take precedence.

service_change.body: The company may change or suspend all or part of the service for operational/technical needs or policy changes, with prior notice for significant changes.

termination.withdrawal: Members can withdraw at any time in settings.
termination.restriction: The company may restrict exposure or suspend accounts for guideline violations or security risks with prior notice.

ip_report.takedown: The company may temporarily block or delete content upon valid infringement claims.
ip_report.counter: Posters may request reposting by submitting counter-evidence.

disclaimer.force_majeure: The company is not liable for damages caused by force majeure events.
disclaimer.disputes: Disputes between members or with third parties are handled by the parties themselves.

law.body: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Korea, and disputes shall be resolved in the court of competent jurisdiction for the company's headquarters.

notice.body: The company may amend the terms within legal limits, with at least 7 days (30 days for unfavorable changes) prior notice.

collect.optional_items: Date of Birth, Gender, Profile Picture, Country/Language, Bio
collect.auto_items: Access logs, IP/device info, cookies, crash logs, notification tokens
collect.social_items: Profile name/email from the provider within their policy

purpose.sns_features: Core SNS features like friend recommendations and feed exposure

share.principle: The company does not provide information to third parties without consent.
share.outsourcing: Certain tasks may be entrusted to specialized companies (cloud hosting, log analysis, messaging) as disclosed in the 'Entrustment' page.

xborder.body: Servers or facilities of entrusted companies may be located overseas. Details are notified within the service.

store.withdrawal: Information is destroyed upon withdrawal, except as required by law.
store.legal_retention: Legal retention periods apply for commerce/payments and communication data.
store.backup: Data in backup systems is destroyed periodically according to technical cycles.

security.encryption: Encrypted storage of passwords and sensitive info
security.access_control: Minimization of access rights and regular checks
security.logs: Retention of access logs and prevention of forgery
security.backup_recovery: Backup/disaster recovery systems for security incidents

rights.h: Article 7 (Rights of Users and Legal Representatives)
rights.data_rights: Users can request access, correction, deletion, or suspension of processing.
rights.settings: Users can change exposure ranges and notification/recommendation settings.
rights.cookies: Cookie settings can be managed in the browser.

children.body: Sign-up for children under 14 is not allowed, and accounts may be restricted upon verification.

notice.body: This policy may be amended due to law/service changes, with 7 days (30 days for unfavorable changes) prior notice.

purpose.body: Provides useful information such as new content, events, and discounts via email/push/SMS.

contents.features: Summary of new features and recommended feeds

channels.individual: Consent/withdrawal is available individually for each channel.
channels.settings: Changes can be made in Settings > Notifications/Marketing or through the link at the bottom of messages.
channels.apply: Withdrawal applies from the next shipment onwards.

partners.body: Some delivery tasks may be entrusted to specialized agencies, and partner marketing requires separate consent.

note.body: Essential operational notices (Terms/Security, etc.) may be sent regardless of consent.

landing.description: Expressions learned through self-produced episodes and Korean folktales and legends
landing.description2: Korean learning space ARA where you write, edit, and share with friends worldwide
landing.point_2: Understanding expressions through folktales and legends
landing.cta_description: Join now and start your first learning course with popular drama scenes.
landing.problem_title: Have you ever had these concerns?
landing.problem_desc: ARA started from the concerns most frequently mentioned by real learners.

problems.1: Important expressions just pass by even when watching dramas.
problems.2: I want to learn Korean used in real-life situations, but I don't know how.
problems.3: Even if I learn expressions, I can't grasp how they are used in conversations.
problems.4: There is no content that I can enjoy watching at my level.
problems.5: It's hard to keep studying consistently on my own.

landing.how_it_works_title: This is how the ARA learning flow proceeds

popular.title: You will learn with this kind of content
popular.description: The learning flow is centered around original animation content based on folktales and legends.

solution.title: Why ARA?
description: Not just memorizing words, but also the flow and emotions within the content
It is designed with the goal of learning that is remembered together.
It is designed so that learning and community experiences naturally continue on one screen.

1.title: Story-based learning
1.desc: Learn vocabulary, expressions, and cultural context by following an episode of traditional tales and legends animation.

2.title: Learn by using the structure
2.desc: Immediately use expressions after learning, and acquire more natural expressions with example sentences and feedback.

3.title: Global community
3.desc: Learners from different languages and backgrounds gather to share Korean language experiences connected through stories.

preview.title: Learn Korean expressions through stories
preview.subtitle: Expressions and nuances naturally through situational dialogue

folktale.title: Meet Korean through traditional tales and legends
folktale.subtitle: Re-read old stories in modern Korean
bullets: Explanation of culture and background in expressions
folktale.alt: Learning content on Korean folktales and legends

community.title: Practice with friends around the world
community.subtitle: Share sentences and receive feedback with learners from various language backgrounds

title.line1: ARA is designed with these learners in mind
title.line2: Although not officially launched yet, ARA is being designed with the thought of

description.intro: Rather than imagining a single typical learner
description.body: It is being created with imagination together.
detail: From people who have just started learning Korean to those preparing for working holidays or studying abroad,
to office workers who need to use Korean in their daily life or work.
Learning lasts longer when using favorite content and community together,
We are designing the flow to continue naturally.

duration.label: Learning duration
duration.desc: We are designing the flow to stay longer than when studying alone with just textbooks.

persona.label: Persona type
persona.desc: We are considering learner types with various countries and goals and reviewing screens and functions.

scenario.label: Learning scenario
scenario.desc: We are continuously building learning scenarios scene by scene for when ARA will be turned on in various situations.

sarah.persona: Beginner learners who started Korean with dramas
sarah.text: Until now, I relied only on subtitles to watch stories, so I often missed important expressions. In ARA, it breaks down each scene and highlights key expressions, so I understand, "Ah, this is the expression used in this situation." It's also fun to watch the same episode again while gradually reducing the subtitles.

diego.persona: Practical learners preparing for working holiday or study abroad
diego.text: I wanted to study expressions that I could actually use before going on a working holiday. The conversations in the animations are organized by situation, so I liked that I could learn to distinguish between 'everyday expressions' and 'expressions to be used with caution.'

meilin.persona: Intermediate to advanced learners who want to start speaking
meilin.text: I know some grammar and vocabulary, but it's always been difficult to express them verbally. When I write short reviews or reactions after watching stories on ARA, it corrects them to more natural expressions. By using those sentences in feeds or DMs, I felt my speaking sense gradually coming back.

alexey.persona: Business learners who need business expressions
alexey.text: I needed business expressions because I often communicate with Korean partners. By comparing the speech of adults and children, and superiors and subordinates in the animations, I could naturally learn expressions suitable for different situations. It was impressive that it wasn't just simple translation but understanding the context.

hana.persona: Self-improvement learners whose routines often break
hana.text: When studying with textbooks, the flow would break after just a few days. With ARA, even watching just one short story is enough for learning, so there's no pressure. I would come in thinking 'just up to this scene today,' and naturally developed a routine of logging in daily.

notice.mobile: The review you are seeing now is a scenario-based example review composed based on the learner personas assumed by ARA.
notice.desktop: The review you are seeing now is a scenario-based review composed based on the learner personas targeted by ARA, not actual user data. After the official launch, this section will continue to be updated with stories from actual learners.

seo.title: Community | ARA - Learn Korean through K-Content
seo.description: This is the ARA community where learners from around the world come together. Learn Korean through K-content, communicate with friends, and enjoy the cultures of various countries.
seo.keywords: ARA, Korean learning, Learn Korean, Korean culture, K-POP, K-Drama, K-Culture, language exchange, feed, global learners
seo.og_title: ARA Community - A global learning platform based on K-content
seo.og_description: Learn Korean through K-content and communicate with learners from around the world on the global home feed ARA.
